mapper.select: /* PromotionMapper.getChrgPrmtAddList */ SELECT DECODE(C.SOC, NULL, '0', '1') AS rowCheck , CD_VAL AS vasCd , CD_DSC AS vasNm , NVL(ETC1,'N') AS dupYn ,B.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A , MSP_RATE_MST B , MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ADD C WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND A.CD_VAL = B.RATE_CD AND B.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND B.RATE_CD = C.SOC(+) AND C.PRMT_ID(+) = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rowCheck DESC, vasNm

/* PromotionMapper.getChrgPrmtDupByInfo */ SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId , B.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , C.RATE_CD AS rateCd , D.ON_OFF_TYPE AS onOffType FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT A , MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ORG B , MSP_CHRG_PRMT_SOC C , MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ONOFF D WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = D.PRMT_ID AND #{strtDt} <= A.END_DT AND #{endDt} >= A.STRT_DT AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} AND ((A.NAC_YN = 'Y' AND A.MNP_YN = 'Y')
OR A.NAC_YN = DECODE(#{nacYn},1,'Y','N')
OR A.MNP_YN = DECODE(#{mnpYn},1,'Y','N')
) AND ((A.ENGG_CNT_0 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_12 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_18 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_24 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_30 = 'Y' AND A.ENGG_CNT_36 = 'Y')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_0 = DECODE(#{enggCnt0},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_12 = DECODE(#{enggCnt12},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_18 = DECODE(#{enggCnt18},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_24 = DECODE(#{enggCnt24},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_30 = DECODE(#{enggCnt30},1,'Y','N')
OR A.ENGG_CNT_36 = DECODE(#{enggCnt36},1,'Y','N')
)
AND B.ORGN_ID IN (SELECT ORG.ORGN_ID FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ORG ORG WHERE ORG.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND C.RATE_CD IN (SELECT SOC.RATE_CD FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT_SOC SOC WHERE SOC.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND D.ON_OFF_TYPE IN (SELECT MCPO.ON_OFF_TYPE FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ONOFF MCPO WHERE MCPO.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}) AND A.PRMT_ID NOT IN (#{prmtId})
ORDER BY B.ORGN_ID, C.RATE_CD, D.ON_OFF_TYPE
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'C' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(NVL(SUBSTR(MAX(PRMT_ID),10), '000')) + 1, '000')) AS prmtId FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT WHERE SUBSTR(PRMT_ID, 2, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
/* PromotionMapper.insertMspChrgPrmt */ INSERT INTO MSP_CHRG_PRMT ( PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DT ,END_DT ,NAC_YN ,MNP_YN ,ORGN_TYPE ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,ENGG_CNT_0 ,ENGG_CNT_12 ,ENGG_CNT_18 ,ENGG_CNT_24 ,ENGG_CNT_30 ,ENGG_CNT_36 ,USG_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{prmtId} ,#{prmtNm} ,#{strtDt} ,#{endDt} ,DECODE(NVL(#{nacYn}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,DECODE(NVL(#{mnpYn}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,#{orgnType} ,#{reqBuyType} ,DECODE(NVL(#{enggCnt0}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,DECODE(NVL(#{enggCnt12}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,DECODE(NVL(#{enggCnt18}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,DECODE(NVL(#{enggCnt24}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,DECODE(NVL(#{enggCnt30}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,DECODE(NVL(#{enggCnt36}, 'N'), 1, 'Y', 'N') ,NVL(#{usgYn}, 'Y') ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE )
mapper.select: /* PromotionMapper.getChrgPrmtDtlList */ SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId , A.PRMT_NM AS prmtNm , A.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , B.ORGN_NM AS orgnNm , A.RATE_CD AS rateCd , C.RATE_NM AS rateNm , A.SOC AS soc , D.RATE_NM AS socNm , D.BASE_AMT AS socAmt , A.SEQ AS seq , A.ON_OFF_TYPE_NM AS onOffTypeNm FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL A , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B , MSP_RATE_MST C , MSP_RATE_MST D WHERE A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND C.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.SOC = D.RATE_CD AND D.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY B.ORGN_NM, C.RATE_NM, D.RATE_NM, A.SEQ

/*PromotionMapper.getChrgPrmtDtlInfo*/ SELECT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId , A.PRMT_NM AS prmtNm , A.STRT_DT AS strtDt , A.END_DT AS endDt , A.NAC_YN AS nacYn , A.MNP_YN AS mnpYn , A.ORGN_TYPE AS orgnType , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0055', A.ORGN_TYPE) AS orgnTypeNm , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE AS reqBuyType , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9022', A.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS reqBuyTypeNm , A.ENGG_CNT_0 AS enggCnt0 , A.ENGG_CNT_12 AS enggCnt12 , A.ENGG_CNT_18 AS enggCnt18 , A.ENGG_CNT_24 AS enggCnt24 , A.ENGG_CNT_30 AS enggCnt30 , A.ENGG_CNT_36 AS enggCnt36 , A.REGST_ID AS regstId , FN_GET_USRNM(A.REGST_ID) AS regstNm , A.REGST_DTTM AS regstDttm , A.RVISN_ID AS rvisnId , FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID) AS rvisnNm , A.RVISN_DTTM AS rvisnDttm , A.USG_YN AS usgYn FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT A WHERE A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}

/* PromotionMapper.getChrgPrmtOnoffList */ SELECT DECODE(B.ON_OFF_TYPE, NULL, '0', '1') AS rowCheck , CD_VAL AS onOffType , CD_DSC AS onOffTypeNm FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A , MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ONOFF B WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'RCP0007' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.CD_VAL = B.ON_OFF_TYPE(+) AND B.PRMT_ID(+) = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rowCheck DESC, A.CD_VAL
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'C' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(NVL(SUBSTR(MAX(PRMT_ID),10), '000')) + 1, '000')) AS prmtId FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT WHERE SUBSTR(PRMT_ID, 2, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
/* PromotionMapper.insertMspChrgPrmtCopy */ INSERT INTO MSP_CHRG_PRMT ( PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DT ,END_DT ,NAC_YN ,MNP_YN ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,ENGG_CNT_0 ,ENGG_CNT_12 ,ENGG_CNT_18 ,ENGG_CNT_24 ,ENGG_CNT_30 ,ENGG_CNT_36 ,USG_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{newPrmtId} ,#{newPrmtNm} ,#{newStrtDt} ,#{newEndDt} ,NAC_YN ,MNP_YN ,#{newReqBuyType} ,ENGG_CNT_0 ,ENGG_CNT_12 ,ENGG_CNT_18 ,ENGG_CNT_24 ,ENGG_CNT_30 ,ENGG_CNT_36 ,USG_YN ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT WHERE PRMT_ID = #{prmtId}
mapper.select: SELECT 'C' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(NVL(SUBSTR(MAX(PRMT_ID),10), '000')) + 1, '000')) AS prmtId FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT WHERE SUBSTR(PRMT_ID, 2, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
/* PromotionMapper.getRecommenIdStateList */
/* PromotionMapper.getRecommenIdStateListByExcel */
/* PromotionMapper.getRecommenHstList */
/* PromotionMapper.getRecommenHstListByExcel */

/* PromotionMapper.getdContractChk */ SELECT COUNT(B.REQUEST_KEY) FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A ,MCP_REQUEST_COMMEND@DL_MCP B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{uploadContractNum} AND B.REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21'

/* PromotionMapper.getdContractDupChk */ SELECT COUNT(B.REQUEST_KEY) FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A ,MCP_REQUEST_COMMEND@DL_MCP B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{uploadContractNum} AND B.APPLY_YN = 'Y' AND B.REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21'
mapper.update: /* PromotionMapper.updateBenefits */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_COMMEND@DL_MCP SET APPLY_YN = 'Y' , APPLY_DATE = SYSDATE , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = (SELECT B.REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A ,MCP_REQUEST_COMMEND@DL_MCP B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{uploadContractNum} AND B.REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
mapper.insert:
SELECT MAX(PRMTID) FROM ( SELECT 'C' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(NVL(SUBSTR(MAX(PRMT_ID),10), '000')) + 1, '000')) AS PRMTID FROM MSP_DIS_MST_CHK WHERE SUBSTR(PRMT_ID, 2, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') UNION ALL SELECT 'C' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(NVL(SUBSTR(MAX(PRMT_ID),10), '000')) + 1, '000')) AS PRMTID FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT WHERE SUBSTR(PRMT_ID, 2, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') )
/*PromotionMapper.insertChrgPrmtMstChk*/ INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_MST_CHK ( PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DTTM ,END_DTTM ,NAC_YN ,MNP_YN ,ORGN_TYPE ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,ENGG_CNT_0 ,ENGG_CNT_12 ,ENGG_CNT_18 ,ENGG_CNT_24 ,ENGG_CNT_30 ,ENGG_CNT_36 ,USG_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{prmtId} ,#{prmtNm} ,#{strtDt} ,#{endDt} ,NVL(#{nacYn}, 'N') ,NVL(#{mnpYn}, 'N') ,#{orgnType} ,#{reqBuyType} ,NVL(#{enggCnt0}, 'N') ,NVL(#{enggCnt12}, 'N') ,NVL(#{enggCnt18}, 'N') ,NVL(#{enggCnt24}, 'N') ,NVL(#{enggCnt30}, 'N') ,NVL(#{enggCnt36}, 'N') ,NVL(#{usgYn}, 'Y') ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE )

/*PromotionMapper.insertChrgPrmtMstExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_CHRG_PRMT ( PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DT ,END_DT ,NAC_YN ,MNP_YN ,ORGN_TYPE ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,ENGG_CNT_0 ,ENGG_CNT_12 ,ENGG_CNT_18 ,ENGG_CNT_24 ,ENGG_CNT_30 ,ENGG_CNT_36 ,USG_YN ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,PRMT_NM ,STRT_DTTM ,END_DTTM ,NAC_YN ,MNP_YN ,ORGN_TYPE ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,ENGG_CNT_0 ,ENGG_CNT_12 ,ENGG_CNT_18 ,ENGG_CNT_24 ,ENGG_CNT_30 ,ENGG_CNT_36 ,USG_YN ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_MST_CHK
/*PromotionMapper.insertChrgPrmtOrgExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ORG ( PRMT_ID ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,ORGN_ID ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_ORG_CHK
/*PromotionMapper.insertChrgPrmtSocExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_CHRG_PRMT_SOC ( PRMT_ID ,RATE_CD ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,RATE_CD ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_SOC_CHK
/*PromotionMapper.insertChrgPrmtOnOffExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ONOFF ( PRMT_ID ,ON_OFF_TYPE ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,ON_OFF_TYPE ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ONOFF_CHK
/*PromotionMapper.insertChrgPrmtAddExl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ADD ( PRMT_ID ,SOC ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT PRMT_ID ,SOC ,REGST_ID ,SYSDATE FROM MSP_DIS_ADD_CHK
mapper.select: /*PromotionMapper.getChrgPrmtListCombo*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.PRMT_ID ,A.PRMT_NM ,TO_CHAR((SELECT SUM(MRM.BASE_AMT) FROM MSP_RATE_MST MRM, MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ADD B WHERE MRM.RATE_CD = B.SOC AND B.PRMT_ID = A.PRMT_ID)) AS DIS_CNT FROM VW_CHRG_PRMT_DTL A , MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP B WHERE A.ADDITION_KEY = B.ADDITION_KEY AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId} AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType} AND A.RATE_CD = #{socCode} AND (CASE WHEN #{operType} = 'NAC3' THEN A.NAC_YN WHEN #{operType} = 'MNP3' THEN A.MNP_YN ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' AND (CASE WHEN #{agrmTrm} = '0' THEN A.ENGG_CNT_0 WHEN #{agrmTrm} = '12' THEN A.ENGG_CNT_12 WHEN #{agrmTrm} = '18' THEN A.ENGG_CNT_18 WHEN #{agrmTrm} = '24' THEN A.ENGG_CNT_24 WHEN #{agrmTrm} = '30' THEN A.ENGG_CNT_30 WHEN #{agrmTrm} = '36' THEN A.ENGG_CNT_36 ELSE 'N' END) = 'Y' AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE = #{onOffType}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.TYPE_DTL_CD3 = B.CD_VAL AND A.TYPE_CD = '20' -- 대리점 AND A.ORGN_STAT_CD = '4' -- 가동 AND B.GRP_ID = 'ORG0043' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 = #{orgnType} AND A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}

/*PromotionMapper.getChrgPrmtDtlOrgnList*/ SELECT A.ORGN_ID AS orgnId ,B.ORGN_NM AS orgnNm FROM MSP_CHRG_PRMT_ORG A ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B WHERE A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND A.PRMT_ID = #{prmtId} ORDER BY orgnNm
